vision_profile.current_state: Priya is a final-year B.Tech student with theoretical AI knowledge but struggles with practical application and building a portfolio.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest obstacle is translating theoretical AI concepts into practical, portfolio-worthy projects and understanding industry expectations.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to secure an AI developer internship to gain hands-on experience and boost her confidence before graduation.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: You're bridging the gap from theory to hands-on coding, setting up your essential toolkit for practical AI development.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill

modules.title: Setting Up Your AI Workbench
modules.description: Master the foundational programming and environment setup crucial for any AI project.

skills.title: Python for AI & Data
skills.description: Learn essential Python programming concepts and syntax specifically tailored for AI and data manipulation.

skills.title: Essential Libraries (NumPy, Pandas)
skills.description: Get hands-on with NumPy for numerical operations and Pandas for data manipulation, key tools in AI.

scenario.title: Analyzing a Small Dataset with Pandas

skills.title: Jupyter Notebooks & Environments
skills.description: Learn to use Jupyter Notebooks for interactive coding and manage your development environments effectively.

scenario.title: Setting Up a Project in Jupyter

modules.title: Understanding Data for AI
modules.description: Learn how to prepare and analyze data, a critical first step before building any AI model.

skills.title: Data Collection & Cleaning Basics
skills.description: Understand how to acquire data and perform initial cleaning to ensure quality for your models.

skills.title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
skills.description: Learn to visualize and summarize data to uncover patterns and insights before modeling.

scenario.title: Finding Insights in a Sales Dataset

skills.title: Feature Engineering Fundamentals
skills.description: Discover how to create new, more informative features from raw data to improve model performance.

scenario.title: Creating Features for a Housing Price Model

modules.title: Your First ML Models
modules.description: Implement and understand basic machine learning models, laying the groundwork for more complex AI applications.

skills.title: Supervised Learning Basics
skills.description: Grasp the core concepts of supervised learning, where models learn from labeled data.

skills.title: Training Simple Regression Models
skills.description: Implement and train basic regression models to predict continuous values.

skills.title: Training Simple Classification Models
skills.description: Build and train basic classification models to categorize data into distinct classes.

milestones.label: P2
milestones.identity_statement: You're now building more robust AI models, evaluating their performance, and creating small, complete projects for your portfolio.

modules.title: Intermediate Machine Learning
modules.description: Dive deeper into model performance, common challenges, and more advanced traditional ML techniques.

skills.title: Model Evaluation & Metrics
skills.description: Learn to accurately assess your model's performance using various metrics for regression and classification.

skills.title: Overfitting & Regularization
skills.description: Understand and combat common issues like overfitting using techniques such as regularization.

skills.title: Ensemble Methods Introduction
skills.description: Explore how combining multiple models can lead to more powerful and accurate predictions.

modules.title: Building Practical ML Pipelines
modules.description: Learn to structure your machine learning projects from data preparation to basic model deployment.

skills.title: Data Preprocessing with Scikit-learn
skills.description: Utilize Scikit-learn for efficient data scaling, encoding, and transformation.

scenario.title: Preprocessing Data for a ML Model

skills.title: Model Training & Hyperparameter Tuning
skills.description: Optimize your models by understanding and tuning hyperparameters for better performance.

skills.title: Basic Model Persistence & Deployment
skills.description: Learn to save your trained models and understand the basics of making them available for use.

modules.title: Introduction to Deep Learning
modules.description: Get started with the powerful world of neural networks and deep learning architectures.

skills.title: Neural Network Fundamentals
skills.description: Understand the basic building blocks of neural networks: neurons, layers, and activation functions.

skills.title: Building Simple ANNs with Keras/TensorFlow
skills.description: Implement and train basic Artificial Neural Networks using popular frameworks like Keras or TensorFlow.

scenario.title: Building an ANN for MNIST Classification

skills.title: Intro to Convolutional Neural Networks
skills.description: Discover CNNs, a powerful type of neural network especially effective for image data.

scenario.title: Building a Simple CNN for Image Recognition

milestones.label: P3
milestones.identity_statement: You're now specializing in advanced AI, building impressive portfolio projects, and getting ready to ace your internship applications.

modules.title: Advanced Model Architectures
modules.description: Explore more complex neural network designs and the exciting field of generative AI.

skills.title: Recurrent Neural Networks Basics
skills.description: Understand RNNs and their application in sequential data like text or time series.

scenario.title: Predicting Stock Prices with an RNN

skills.title: Transfer Learning for Computer Vision
skills.description: Leverage pre-trained models to quickly build high-performing computer vision applications.

scenario.title: Classifying Custom Images with Transfer Learning

skills.title: Generative Models Fundamentals
skills.description: Explore the basics of models that can create new data, like GANs and VAEs.

scenario.title: Generating Simple Images with a GAN

modules.title: Building Portfolio-Ready Projects
modules.description: Create impactful, end-to-end AI projects that will make your internship applications shine.

skills.title: End-to-End Image Classification Project
skills.description: Develop a complete project from data acquisition to model deployment for image classification.

skills.title: Simple Text Generation Project
skills.description: Create a project that generates new text using a basic generative AI model.

skills.title: Presenting AI Projects & Code
skills.description: Learn to effectively showcase your projects, explain your code, and highlight your contributions.

modules.title: Internship Readiness
modules.description: Prepare for the internship application process, from understanding roles to acing interviews.

skills.title: Understanding AI Developer Roles
skills.description: Gain clarity on what AI developer interns do and the different specializations within the field.

skills.title: Crafting an AI-focused Resume & Cover Letter
skills.description: Build a compelling resume and cover letter that highlights your AI skills and projects.

scenario.title: Tailoring Your Resume for an AI Role

skills.title: AI Interview Preparation (Technical & Behavioral)
skills.description: Prepare for common technical questions, coding challenges, and behavioral interviews for AI internships.
